metadata.name: openapi-llm
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Convert and invoke OpenAPI specifications as LLM tool/function definitions

modules.name: openapi_llm.client
documentation: Client module for OpenAPI LLM.

classes.name: openapi_llm.client.openapi.OpenAPIClient

methods.name: openapi_llm.client.openapi.OpenAPIClient.invoke
documentation:
Invokes a function specified in the function payload.

```
param function_payload

The function payload containing the details of the function to be invoked.

returns

The response from the service after invoking the function.

raises OpenAPIClientError

If the function invocation payload cannot be extracted from the function payload.

raises HttpClientError

If an error occurs while sending the request and receiving the response.
```
A client for invoking operations on REST services defined by OpenAPI specifications.

classes.name: openapi_llm.client.openapi.OpenAPIClientError
documentation: Exception raised for errors in the OpenAPI client.

classes.name: openapi_llm.client.openapi.HttpClientError
documentation: Exception raised for HTTP-related errors during service invocation.

classes.name: openapi_llm.client.config.ClientConfig

methods.name: openapi_llm.client.config.ClientConfig.__init__
documentation:
Initialize client configuration.

```
param openapi_spec

OpenAPI specification to use.

param credentials

Authentication credentials.

param request_sender

Custom function for sending HTTP requests.

param llm_provider

LLM provider implementation to use.

param operations_filter

Deprecated. Use converter_config instead.

param converter_config

Configuration for OpenAPI to LLM function conversion.

raises ValueError

If the OpenAPI specification format is invalid.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.client.config.ClientConfig.get_authenticator
documentation:
Get the authentication function for request processing.

Creates an authenticator function that applies the configured credentials
according to the security schemes defined in the OpenAPI spec.

```
returns

Function that applies authentication to requests.

raises ValueError

If the credentials type is not supported.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.client.config.ClientConfig.get_tool_definitions
documentation:
Get the LLM tool/function definitions for the OpenAPI spec.

Converts the OpenAPI specification into LLM-specific function/tool definitions
using the configured LLM provider.

:returns: List of tool/function definitions ready for LLM use.

methods.name: openapi_llm.client.config.ClientConfig.get_payload_extractor
documentation:
Get the parser for LLM tool call invocation payloads.

Returns a function that can extract the actual tool call payload
from LLM-specific response formats.

:returns: Function that extracts tool call payloads from LLM responses.

methods.name: openapi_llm.client.config.ClientConfig._create_authenticator_from_credentials
documentation:
Create an authenticator function from provided credentials.

```
param credentials

Authentication credentials string.

param security_schemes

Security schemes from OpenAPI spec.

returns

Function that applies authentication to requests.

raises ValueError

If unable to create authenticator from credentials.
```

Configuration for OpenAPI to LLM function calling.

Manages the configuration needed to convert OpenAPI specifications to LLM functions
and handle authentication and request processing.

functions.name: openapi_llm.utils.normalize_tool_definition
documentation:
Normalizes the given tool definition by adjusting its properties to LLM requirements.

While various LLMs have slightly different requirements for tool definitions, we normalize them to a common
format that is compatible with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Cohere LLMs:
\- tool names have to match the pattern ^\[[a-zA-Z0-9]\]+\$ and are truncated to 64 characters
\- tool/parameter descriptions are truncated to 1024 characters

For reference on tool definition formats, see:
: - <https://cookbook.openai.com/examples/how_to_call_functions_with_chat_models#basic-concepts>
  - <https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/tool-use>
  - <https://docs.cohere.com/docs/tool-use>

```
param data

The function calling definition(s) to normalize.

returns

A normalized function calling definition.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.utils.normalize_function_name
documentation:
Normalizes the function name to match the LLM function naming requirements.

While various LLMs have slightly different requirements for tool (function) names, we normalize them to
a common format that is compatible with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Cohere LLMs:
\- The function name must match the pattern ^\[[a-zA-Z0-9]\]+\$
\- The function name must be truncated to 64 characters

```
param name

The original function name.

returns

A normalized function name that matches the allowed pattern.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.utils.create_function_payload_extractor
documentation:
Extracts invocation payload from a given LLM completion containing function invocation.

```
param arguments_field_name

The name of the field containing the function arguments.

return

A function that extracts the function invocation details from the LLM payload.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.utils.send_request
documentation:
Send an HTTP request and return the response.

```
param request

The request to send.

returns

The response from the server.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.utils.build_request
documentation:
Build an HTTP request for the operation.

```
param operation

The operation to build the request for.

param kwargs

The arguments to use for building the request.

returns

The HTTP request as a dictionary.

raises ValueError

If a required parameter is missing.

raises NotImplementedError

If the request body content type is not supported. We only support JSON payloads.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.utils.apply_authentication
documentation:
Apply the authentication strategy to the given request.

```
param auth_strategy

The authentication strategy to apply.
```

This is a function that takes a security scheme and a request as arguments (at runtime)
and applies the authentication
\:param operation: The operation to apply the authentication to.
\:param request: The request to apply the authentication to.

classes.name: openapi_llm.utils.HttpClientError
documentation: Exception raised for errors in the HTTP client.

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.auth.create_api_key_authenticator
documentation:
Creates a function that applies API key authentication to requests.

Generates an authenticator function that can inject an API key into different parts
of a request (header, query, or cookie) based on the security scheme.

```
param api_key

The API key to use for authentication.

returns

A function that applies API key authentication according to the security scheme.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.auth.create_bearer_token_authenticator
documentation:
Creates a function that applies Bearer token authentication to requests.

Generates an authenticator function that can inject a Bearer token into request headers
according to the HTTP authentication scheme.

```
param token

The authentication token to use.

returns

A function that applies Bearer token authentication according to the security scheme.
```

modules.name: openapi_llm.core.provider
documentation: Base provider interface for LLM providers.

classes.name: openapi_llm.core.provider.LLMProvider

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.provider.LLMProvider.converter
documentation:
Returns a function that converts OpenAPI specs to provider-specific function/tool definitions.

The returned converter transforms OpenAPI specifications into the format expected by
the specific LLM provider (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere, etc).

:returns: Function that converts OpenAPI specs to LLM-specific function definitions.

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.provider.LLMProvider.payload_extractor
documentation:
Returns a function that extracts prepared tools invocation payload from LLM responses.

The returned parser knows how to extract the function/tool call arguments from the
specific format used by each LLM provider.

:returns: Function that extracts function call arguments from provider-specific responses.

Base interface for LLM provider implementations.

Defines the contract that all LLM providers must implement to support
OpenAPI to LLM function/tool conversion.

modules.name: openapi_llm.providers.anthropic
documentation: Anthropic LLM provider implementation.

classes.name: openapi_llm.providers.anthropic.AnthropicProvider

methods.name: openapi_llm.providers.anthropic.AnthropicProvider.converter
documentation:
Return the Anthropic-specific schema converter.

:returns: Function that converts OpenAPI specs to Anthropic tool definitions

methods.name: openapi_llm.providers.anthropic.AnthropicProvider.payload_extractor
documentation:
Return the payload extractor for Anthropic responses.

The extractor looks for the 'input' field in the response and processes it
according to Anthropic's tool calling format.

:returns: Function that extracts tool call details from Anthropic responses

Provider implementation for Anthropic's tool calling.

This provider handles the conversion of OpenAPI specifications to Anthropic's tool
calling format and extraction of function call payloads from Anthropic responses.

modules.name: openapi_llm.providers.openai
documentation: OpenAI LLM provider implementation.

classes.name: openapi_llm.providers.openai.OpenAIProvider

methods.name: openapi_llm.providers.openai.OpenAIProvider.converter
documentation:
Return the OpenAI-specific schema converter.

:returns: Function that converts OpenAPI specs to OpenAI tool definitions

methods.name: openapi_llm.providers.openai.OpenAIProvider.payload_extractor
documentation:
Return the payload extractor for OpenAI responses.

The extractor looks for the 'arguments' field in the LLM tool calling response
and processes it according to OpenAI's tool calling format.

:returns: Function that extracts tool call details from OpenAI responses

Provider implementation for OpenAI's tool calling.

This provider handles the conversion of OpenAPI specifications to OpenAI's tool
calling format and extraction of function call payloads from OpenAI responses.

modules.name: openapi_llm.core.spec
documentation: SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2022-present deepset GmbH <info@deepset.ai>
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.create_operation_id
documentation:
Creates a standardized operationId from a path and HTTP method.

Generates a synthetic operationId when one is not provided in the OpenAPI spec
by combining the path and HTTP method.

```
param path

The OpenAPI spec path to convert.

param http_method

The HTTP method to use for the operationId.

returns

The generated operationId.
```

classes.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.Operation

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.Operation.get_parameters
documentation:
Get operation parameters filtered by location.

Retrieves parameters from the operation, optionally filtered by their location
in the request (header, query, or path).

```
param parameter_location

The location of the parameters to get.

returns

The parameters for the operation as a list of dictionaries.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.Operation.get_server
documentation:
Get the server URL for this operation.

Retrieves the server URL from operation, path, or root level, in that order of precedence.

```
param server_index

The index of the server to use.

returns

The server URL.

raises ValueError

If no servers are found in the specification.
```

Represents an operation in an OpenAPI specification

See <https://spec.openapis.org/oas/latest.html#paths-object> for details.
Path objects can contain multiple operations, each with a unique combination of path and method.

```
param path

Path of the operation.

param method

HTTP method of the operation.

param operation_dict

Operation details from OpenAPI spec

param spec_dict

The encompassing OpenAPI specification.

param security_requirements

A list of security requirements for the operation.

param request_body

Request body details.

param parameters

Parameters for the operation.
```

classes.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.OpenAPISpecification

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.OpenAPISpecification.__init__
documentation:
Initialize an OpenAPISpecification instance.

```
param spec_dict

The OpenAPI specification as a dictionary.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.OpenAPISpecification.from_str
documentation:
Create an OpenAPISpecification instance from a string.

```
param content

The string content of the OpenAPI specification.

returns

The OpenAPISpecification instance.

raises ValueError

If the content cannot be decoded as JSON or YAML.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.OpenAPISpecification.from_file
documentation:
Create an OpenAPISpecification instance from a file.

```
param spec_file

The file path to the OpenAPI specification.

returns

The OpenAPISpecification instance.

raises FileNotFoundError

If the specified file does not exist.

raises IOError

If an I/O error occurs while reading the file.

raises ValueError

If the file content cannot be decoded as JSON or YAML.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.OpenAPISpecification.from_url
documentation:
Create an OpenAPISpecification instance from a URL.

```
param url

The URL to fetch the OpenAPI specification from.

returns

The OpenAPISpecification instance.

raises ConnectionError

If fetching the specification from the URL fails.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.OpenAPISpecification.find_operation_by_id
documentation:
Find an Operation by operationId.

```
param op_id

The operationId of the operation.

returns

The matching operation

raises ValueError

If no operation is found with the given operationId.
```

methods.name: openapi_llm.core.spec.OpenAPISpecification.get_security_schemes
documentation:
Get the security schemes from the OpenAPI specification.

:returns: The security schemes as a dictionary.
Represents an OpenAPI specification. See https://spec.openapis.org/oas/latest.html for details.

modules.name: openapi_llm.providers.cohere
documentation: Cohere LLM provider implementation.

classes.name: openapi_llm.providers.cohere.CohereProvider

methods.name: openapi_llm.providers.cohere.CohereProvider.converter
documentation:
Return the Cohere-specific schema converter.

:returns: Function that converts OpenAPI specs to Cohere tool definitions

methods.name: openapi_llm.providers.cohere.CohereProvider.payload_extractor
documentation:
Return the payload extractor for Cohere responses.

The extractor looks for the 'parameters' field in the response and processes it
according to Cohere's tool calling format.

:returns: Function that extracts tool call details from Cohere responses

Provider implementation for Cohere's tool calling.

This provider handles the conversion of OpenAPI specifications to Cohere's tool
calling format and extraction of function call payloads from Cohere responses.

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion.openai_converter
documentation:
Converts OpenAPI specification to a list of tools suitable for OpenAI LLM tool calling.

See <https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/function-calling> for more information about OpenAI's tool schema.
\:param schema: The OpenAPI specification to convert.
\:param config: Configuration controlling the conversion process.
\:returns: A list of dictionaries, each dictionary representing an OpenAI tool definition.

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion.anthropic_converter
documentation:
Converts an OpenAPI specification to a list of tool definitions for Anthropic LLM tool calling.

See <https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/tool-use> for more information about Anthropic's tool schema.

```
param schema

The OpenAPI specification to convert.

param config

Configuration controlling the conversion process.

returns

A list of dictionaries, each dictionary representing Anthropic tool definition.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion.cohere_converter
documentation:
Converts an OpenAPI specification to a list of function definitions for Cohere LLM function calling.

See <https://docs.cohere.com/docs/tool-use> for more information about Cohere's function schema.

```
param schema

The OpenAPI specification to convert.

param config

Configuration controlling the conversion process.

returns

A list of dictionaries, each representing a Cohere style function definition.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion._openapi_to_tools
documentation:
Extracts operations from the OpenAPI specification, converts them into a tool schema.

```
param service_openapi_spec

The OpenAPI specification to extract operations from.

param parameters_name

The name of the parameters field in the tool schema.

param operation_converter

Function that converts an OpenAPI operation into an LLM-specific tool schema.

param config

Configuration controlling the conversion process.

returns

A list of dictionaries, each dictionary representing a tool schema.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion._convert_operation_to_openai_schema
documentation:
Converts an OpenAPI operation into OpenAI's function schema format.

Transforms the OpenAPI operation specification into OpenAI's expected function
definition format, including name, description, and parameters schema.

```
param resolved_spec

The resolved OpenAPI operation specification.

param parameters_name

The name of the parameters field in the function schema.

returns

A dictionary containing the OpenAI function schema.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion._parse_property_attributes
documentation:
Recursively parses the attributes of a property schema.

```
param property_schema

The property schema to parse.

param include_attributes

The attributes to include in the parsed schema.

returns

A dictionary containing the parsed property schema.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion._convert_operation_to_cohere_schema
documentation:
Converts an OpenAPI operation into Cohere's function schema format.

Transforms the OpenAPI operation specification into Cohere's expected function
definition format, including name, description, and parameter definitions.

```
param operation

The operation specification to convert.

param ignored_param

Ignored parameter, maintained for API compatibility with OpenAI converter.

returns

A dictionary containing the Cohere function schema.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion._parse_parameters
documentation:
Parses the parameters from an operation specification.

```
param operation

The operation specification to parse.

returns

A dictionary containing the parsed parameters.
```

functions.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion._parse_schema
documentation:
Parses a schema part of an operation specification.

```
param schema

The schema to parse.

param required

Whether the schema is required.

param description

The description of the schema.

returns

A dictionary containing the parsed schema.
```

classes.name: openapi_llm.core.schema_conversion.ConverterConfig
documentation:
Configuration for OpenAPI to LLM function conversion.

```
param filter_fn

Optional function to filter OpenAPI operations based on custom criteria.
Takes operation dict as input and returns bool.

param max_functions

Optional maximum number of functions to convert.
```
